message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state for concurrent agent work

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect current status of tracked issues.
This synchronizes the local issue tracker with work completed across
multiple parallel agent sessions (including conformance test runner,
extension harness, and provider onboarding work items). Bead status
fields updated to match actual completion state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
